recommendation_rationale: Oval faces are versatile, so structured frames usually preserve facial balance.
Angular frames usually add contrast to rounder facial contours.
Longer faces usually benefit from frames that add width and visual depth.
Heart-shaped faces often balance well with softer or bottom-heavy frames.
